category_sources: source_facts.description says this is a native Home Assistant agent for desktop/laptop devices; GitHub README describes exposing device sensors, controls, and events to Home Assistant.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses "Go Hass Agent".
docs_sources: Official GitHub README includes a documentation/table-of-contents surface with getting started, usage, configuration, sensors, MQTT, and FAQ sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/joshuar/go-hass-agent; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Home Assistant desktop/laptop agent; official README describes sensors, controls, events, MQTT, and command usage.
